description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker with a vibrant green suede upper and three white leather stripes on the side, characteristic of classic Adidas designs. The shoe features a white rubber sole with a slightly textured edge and a rounded toe. The tongue is padded and white, with a blue and white label visible, while the heel tab is also white and slightly raised. White laces are threaded through standard eyelets in a criss-cross pattern, and the interior lining appears to be a soft, light material. Subtle gold text branding is present near the stripes, and the overall construction suggests comfort and durability for urban walking or casual sports use.
description: A green suede sneaker with white leather stripes, white laces, and a white rubber sole, featuring classic Adidas styling and gold branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green suede upper, three white stripes, and gold branding near the heel.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the rounded toe, white laces, and padded tongue with a blue and white label.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the white heel tab, gold branding, and the shoe's interior lining.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the heel tab and the overall shape of the shoe's rear and sole.
attribute_logo: Three white stripes on the side; blue and white label on the tongue; gold text branding near the stripes.
